scripts.lint: npm --prefix client run lint && npm --prefix server run lint
scripts.lint:fix: npm --prefix client run lint:eslint:fix && npm --prefix server run lint:eslint:fix
scripts.lint:typescript: npm --prefix client run lint:typescript && npm --prefix server run lint:typescript
scripts.test: npm --prefix client run test && npm --prefix server run test:coverage && npm --prefix server run test:e2e
scripts.check:all: npm run lint && npm run check && npm run knip && npm run lint:typescript
